vars.subject: Call tomorrow at 10?
vars.plain_text_excerpt: Hey - can you confirm tomorrow at 10a pacific? We need to close the hiring loop on the senior ML role before Friday.

vars.subject: Scheduled maintenance on RDS
vars.plain_text_excerpt: Your RDS instance db-prod will be rebooted on April 24 at 02:00 UTC for a minor engine patch. No action is required; failover will be automatic.

vars.subject: This week in ML
vars.plain_text_excerpt: Meta released Llama 4 Scout 17B under a permissive license. Mistral shipped MoE 8x22B.
